_note: Tier-1/tier-2 macro events that affect Indian markets. The TFA's event_calendar.py reads this on session start (and reloads on day change). Update from: RBI policy calendar, FOMC schedule (federalreserve.gov), MoSPI for India CPI/GDP/PMI, US BLS for NFP/CPI/PCE, NSE/MCX for monthly expiries. Times must be in IST (+05:30) — release moment, not market open.
_tier_meaning: 1 = market-moving (FOMC, RBI, India CPI, US NFP, US CPI, Budget). 2 = secondary but watched (India GDP, US GDP, monthly expiry). Tier 3+ (PMI, minor data) is intentionally excluded; the model does not need it as a discrete feature.
